TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Alexander Van der Bellen == u siwkay niza tatama, 1 bulad 18 demiad, Alexander Van der Bellen, u misingkiway. 1944 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Austria ayza sa ci Alexander Van der Bellen, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 1 bulad 26 demiad. naku sasaydang ciniza, pasubana' i tabakiay a cacudadan. mikinkiw ciniza ku kyizay. 2016.12.4 maala ciniza ku Cungtung singkiw, mamikuwan tu ku Cungtung ni Awtili kanatal. u ngangan niza u sulit nu Hulam: šļěś≠∑ŚĪĪŚ§ß¬∑ŤĆÉŚĺ∑Ť≤ĚŚÄę u sulit nu Śĺ∑Ť™ě: Alexander Van der Bellen kakuniza u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Alexander Van der Bellen is an Austrianpolitician and economist who is the 12th and current State President of Austria since 26 January 2017.
S.PHON: == ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr *an d…ôr b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn == u siwkaj niza tatama, * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr *an d…ôr b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan) u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu austria ajza sa ¶i ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr *an d…ôr b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. naku sasajdaŇč ¶iniza, pasubana Ē~ ° i tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. mikinkiw ¶iniza ku kjizaj. ****.**.* maar~…ĺa ¶iniza ku ¶uŇčtuŇč siŇčkiw, mamikuwan tu ku ¶uŇčtuŇč ni awtir~…ĺi kanatar~…ĺ. u ŇčaŇčan niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ********* u sur~…ĺit nu **: ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr *an d…ôr b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn kakuniza u nasur~…ĺitan nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr *an d…ôr b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn is an austrianpor~…ĺiti ¶ian and …ô ¶onomist wńßo is tńß…ô **tńß and ¶urr…ônt stat…ô pr…ôsid…ônt of austria sin ¶…ô ** *anuarj ****.
S.FORM: == Alexander Van der Bellen == u siwkay niza tatama, 1 bulad 18 demiad, Alexander Van der Bellen, u misingkiway. 1944 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Austria ayza sa ci Alexander Van der Bellen, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 1 bulad 26 demiad. naku sasaydang ciniza, pasubana' i tabakiay a cacudadan. mikinkiw ciniza ku kyizay. 2016.12.4 maala ciniza ku Cungtung singkiw, mamikuwan tu ku Cungtung ni Awtili kanatal. u ngangan niza u sulit nu Hulam: šļěś≠∑ŚĪĪŚ§ß¬∑ŤĆÉŚĺ∑Ť≤ĚŚÄę u sulit nu Śĺ∑Ť™ě: Alexander Van der Bellen kakuniza u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Alexander Van der Bellen is an Austrianpolitician and economist who is the 12th and current State President of Austria since 26 January 2017.
